fields.label: API Token
fields.helpText: Go to Pipedrive -> Settings -> Personal preferences -> API -> Your personal API token

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API token via Pipedrive /users/me endpoint

metadata.summary: Pipedrive CRM for managing deals, contacts, activities, and sales pipelines via the Pipedrive REST API.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to Pipedrive.
2. Go to Settings -> Personal preferences -> API.
3. Copy your personal API token.
4. Note your company domain (from the URL: yourcompany.pipedrive.com).
5. Paste both values here.
